Title: Manage note attendees

Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want to add and remove meeting attendees from notes
So that meeting context reflects who participated

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Note cards list attendees from note template data.
- [ ] Users can remove attendees.
- [ ] Users can add attendees from account team choices.
- [ ] Adding a new attendee can also add that person to the account team when confirmed.

Notes: Implemented inside NotesSection attendee controls.
